inclusion_criteria: At least 2 independent reports in GitHub Discussions (Reports category)
14-day response window granted to the operator

severities.fake_models: Served a downgraded/different model while billing for the premium one
severities.data_leak: User prompts, API keys or payment info exposed
severities.unauthorized_charge: Charged without delivering the promised tokens
severities.banned_upstream: Account terminated by the official provider; users left holding worthless credits

policy.removal: Entries may be removed if the issue is verifiably resolved, ownership has changed, or the original evidence is retracted.
